mapper.insert: insert into news(categoryID,categoryName,title,img, mbimg, url, zhaiyao, content ,mbcontent, isHot, isRed, SEOTitle, SEOKeywords, SEODescription, sortID, addTime, updateTime) values(#{categoryID},#{categoryName},#{title},#{img},#{mbimg},#{url},#{zhaiyao},#{content},#{mbcontent}, #{isHot},#{isRed},#{SEOTitle},#{SEOKeywords},#{SEODescription},#{sortID},#{addTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update news set isShow=0 where id IN
#{id}
